{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Relation Management Officer",
  "description": "TransitEdge Solutions Limited is a logistics and supply chain company focused on delivering efficient, reliable, and technology-driven solutions. The company provides services such as freight transportation, warehousing, distribution, procurement and supply chain consulting. With a strong emphasis on innovation, real-time tracking and customer satisfaction, TransitEdge helps businesses streamline operations and improve delivery efficiency. The company offers a dynamic and growth-driven environment, making it an attractive place for talented professionals looking to build a career in logistics and operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Relation Management Officer&nbsp;
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Understand the commercial operation, challenges, and objectives of each team; improve their operation through CRM administration and consultation.
	Provide system administration support for the CRM, focusing on user permissions, custom objects, workflows, and profiles.
	Create, manage, and optimize complex workflow rules, data validation, and approval processes.
	Create and manage custom objects, fields, formulas, record types, page layouts, reports, and dashboards.
	Analyze data to provide insights into team operation, effectiveness, and productivity.
	Work closely with other team members to capture business requirements and implement CRM solutions.
	Coordinate and support integrations with third-party apps, plugins, and tools.
	Support daily troubleshooting, bug fixing, user adoption, training, and documentation.
	Identify and resolve data anomalies, maintaining high data integrity.


Requirements and skills


	Experience working directly with sales teams and implementing their requirements in the CRM system.
	Ability to administer and configure a CRM system (custom objects, workflows, permissions, etc.).
	Familiarity with automating business processes, creating reports/dashboards, and data analysis/modeling.
	Strong communication, collaboration, and problem-solving skills.
	Fluency in English, diligence, enthusiasm, and an interest in marketing strategy, content marketing, SEO, HR, recruiting, and tech.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr.transitedgeltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-27",

Customer Relation Management Officer  Job at TransitEdge Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        TransitEdge Solutions Limited is a logistics and supply chain company focused on delivering efficient, reliable, and technology-driven solutions. The company provides services such as freight transportation, warehousing, distribution, procurement and supply chain consulting. With a strong emphasis on innovation, real-time tracking and customer satisfaction, TransitEdge helps businesses streamline operations and improve delivery efficiency. The company offers a dynamic and growth-driven environment, making it an attractive place for talented professionals looking to build a career in logistics and operations.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Relation Management Officer 
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Understand the commercial operation, challenges, and objectives of each team; improve their operation through CRM administration and consultation.
	Provide system administration support for the CRM, focusing on user permissions, custom objects, workflows, and profiles.
	Create, manage, and optimize complex workflow rules, data validation, and approval processes.
	Create and manage custom objects, fields, formulas, record types, page layouts, reports, and dashboards.
	Analyze data to provide insights into team operation, effectiveness, and productivity.
	Work closely with other team members to capture business requirements and implement CRM solutions.
	Coordinate and support integrations with third-party apps, plugins, and tools.
	Support daily troubleshooting, bug fixing, user adoption, training, and documentation.
	Identify and resolve data anomalies, maintaining high data integrity.


Requirements and skills


	Experience working directly with sales teams and implementing their requirements in the CRM system.
	Ability to administer and configure a CRM system (custom objects, workflows, permissions, etc.).
	Familiarity with automating business processes, creating reports/dashboards, and data analysis/modeling.
	Strong communication, collaboration, and problem-solving skills.
	Fluency in English, diligence, enthusiasm, and an interest in marketing strategy, content marketing, SEO, HR, recruiting, and tech.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrical Engineer",
  "description": "AVR Energies located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, is an innovative and unique company that specialises in the management of thermal power plants. The company provides holistic and comprehensive services that include ideation, management, maintenance and smooth running of the power plant. The company as a team possesses high technical knowledge and are pioneers who have operated and maintained more than 2100 MW (cumulative) round the globe.

AVR backed by a technically sound team in the energy field, having an experience of more than 25 years of managing Power plant activities and have demonstrated record plant performances. We are backed up by power plant engineering, design, control and instrumentation, product design, performance optimization and Troubleshooting team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Electrical Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Kano

Job Description


	We are pleased to inform you that we are currently expanding our team and are looking for talented, passionate, and driven individuals to join us.
	If you are someone who is eager to grow, take on new challenges, and build a rewarding career, we would love to hear from you.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a relevant qualification with at least 5 years experience in operation &amp; Management (O&amp;M) in power plant.


Why join us?


	Dynamic and collaborative work environment
	Opportunities for learning and career growth
	Competitive compensation and benefits.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;jobs@avrenergies.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
Or
Click here to apply online

Note


	Only Indian Professionals must Apply.
	If you have relevant experience in power plant operations, maintenance and ready for international opportunity, we encourage you to apply.

Electrical Engineer Job at AVR Energies




        
    

        
        AVR Energies located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, is an innovative and unique company that specialises in the management of thermal power plants. The company provides holistic and comprehensive services that include ideation, management, maintenance and smooth running of the power plant. The company as a team possesses high technical knowledge and are pioneers who have operated and maintained more than 2100 MW (cumulative) round the globe.

AVR backed by a technically sound team in the energy field, having an experience of more than 25 years of managing Power plant activities and have demonstrated record plant performances. We are backed up by power plant engineering, design, control and instrumentation, product design, performance optimization and Troubleshooting team.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer

Job Location: Kano

Job Description


	We are pleased to inform you that we are currently expanding our team and are looking for talented, passionate, and driven individuals to join us.
	If you are someone who is eager to grow, take on new challenges, and build a rewarding career, we would love to hear from you.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a relevant qualification with at least 5 years experience in operation & Management (O&M) in power plant.


Why join us?


	Dynamic and collaborative work environment
	Opportunities for learning and career growth
	Competitive compensation and benefits.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
Or
Click here to apply online

Note


	Only Indian Professionals must Apply.
	If you have relevant experience in power plant operations, maintenance and ready for international opportunity, we encourage you to apply.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Mechanical Engineer Job at AVR Energies




        
    

        
        AVR Energies located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, is an innovative and unique company that specialises in the management of thermal power plants. The company provides holistic and comprehensive services that include ideation, management, maintenance and smooth running of the power plant. The company as a team possesses high technical knowledge and are pioneers who have operated and maintained more than 2100 MW (cumulative) round the globe.

AVR backed by a technically sound team in the energy field, having an experience of more than 25 years of managing Power plant activities and have demonstrated record plant performances. We are backed up by power plant engineering, design, control and instrumentation, product design, performance optimization and Troubleshooting team.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Mechanical Engineer

Job Location: Kano

Job Description


	We are pleased to inform you that we are currently expanding our team and are looking for talented, passionate, and driven individuals to join us.
	If you are someone who is eager to grow, take on new challenges, and build a rewarding career, we would love to hear from you.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications in relevant field, with at least 5 years in operation & Management (O&M) in power plant.


Why join us?


	Dynamic and collaborative work environment
	Opportunities for learning and career growth
	Competitive compensation and benefits.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
Or
Click here to apply online

Note


	Only Indian Professionals must apply.
	If you have relevant experience in power plant operations, maintenance and ready for international opportunity, we encourage you to apply.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Building Engineer",
  "description": "WTS Energy provides recruitment and manpower services for the global oil and gas and energy industries. We supply engineers and consultants to our clients&#39; projects and operations, and perform employment outsourcing services such as workforce management in oil and gas regions around the world. WTS Energy operates globally with offices in 14 countries and is operational in over 50 countries.

We are recruiting qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Building Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp; Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Oil &amp; Gas

Job Summary


	WTS Energy is seeking a Senior Building Engineer to join their team supporting a major LNG train project in Nigeria.
	This role is within the oil and gas sector, focusing on industrial building design and construction support for large-scale energy infrastructure.
	The Senior Building Engineer will independently manage building design validation, material and vendor engineering, field design changes, and multi-disciplinary coordination to ensure design consistency and constructability.
	The position requires leading technical discussions with clients, resolving site issues promptly, and integrating drawings with 3D models to prevent construction conflicts.
	Candidates can expect a dynamic work environment with opportunities to influence critical project milestones and collaborate across diverse engineering disciplines.


Responsibilities


	Lead the design, review, and validation of building structural systems, layouts, and associated disciplines including waterproofing, roofing, finishing works, and building services integration such as electrical, instrumentation, plumbing, and HVAC.
	Independently manage the full project cycle from design through construction support to close-out, ensuring compliance with international codes and project specifications.
	Conduct thorough review and approval of Material Approval Requests (MAR), evaluating vendor technical documents and datasheets for compliance and initiating corrective actions when necessary.
	Oversee and manage Field Design Changes (FDC), providing engineering judgment on constructability, proposing alternative design solutions, and ensuring changes are technically sound, cost-effective, and aligned with project standards.
	Act as the primary technical coordinator for building-related multi-disciplinary interfaces, resolving design conflicts and ensuring consistency across electrical, instrumentation, HVAC, piping, and civil works disciplines.
	Lead technical discussions and negotiations with the Client, effectively defending design decisions, addressing comments, and proposing practical alternatives to achieve design closure.
	Review and ensure consistency between Approved for Construction (AFC) drawings, 3D models, and site conditions to identify and resolve mismatches prior to construction.
	Provide prompt and reliable construction support by addressing site queries, construction deviations, and delivering sound engineering decisions under pressure.
	Demonstrate strong ownership and accountability, maintaining clear and firm communication with contractors, subcontractors, the Client, and internal teams to drive project milestones and deliverables.


Qualifications
Required Qualifications:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Architectural or Building Engineering
	10&ndash;15 years of proven experience in industrial building design, preferably within Oil &amp; Gas or LNG projects
	Demonstrated expertise across the full project cycle: Design, Construction Support, and Close-out phases
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel for data handling and engineering tracking, Microsoft Word and PowerPoint for technical reporting and presentations, and AutoCAD for drawing review and mark-up
	Experience with 3D model review software such as PDMS, E3D, or SP3D
	Strong working knowledge of international codes and standards including ASCE, ACI, BS, and Eurocode
	Fluent English communication skills with the ability to convey complex technical information clearly
	Proven ability to independently manage building design and engineering tasks, including structural system validation, waterproofing, roofing, finishing works, and integration of building services (electrical, instrumentation, plumbing, HVAC)
	Expertise in reinforced concrete and steel structural configurations, foundation systems, and multi-disciplinary interface management
	Skilled in identifying design inconsistencies, interference issues, and associated risks, with the ability to interpret and apply project specifications and international codes to practical design and site conditions
	Experience in material and vendor engineering, including review and approval of Material Approval Requests (MAR), evaluation of vendor technical documents, and ensuring compliance with project specifications
	Competence in managing field design changes, providing engineering judgment on constructability, and delivering technically sound, cost-effective design solutions
	Strong multi-disciplinary coordination skills to manage complex interface issues and ensure design consistency across electrical, instrumentation, HVAC, piping, and civil works
	Ability to lead technical discussions with clients, defend design decisions, negotiate effectively, and propose practical alternatives
	Capability to review and ensure consistency between Approved for Construction (AFC) drawings, 3D models, and site conditions
	Experience providing construction support and resolving site queries and deviations under pressure.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience working on brownfield projects with site constraints
	Deep understanding of constructability principles and temporary versus permanent solution strategies
	Familiarity with code-based design justification and deviation handling processes (Technical Queries, Deviations, Letters)
	Knowledge of lifting, installation constraints, and equipment interface considerations
	Demonstrated ability to work independently with minimal supervision, exhibiting strong ownership and accountability
	Effective communication skills for engaging with contractors, subcontractors, clients, and internal teams under high-pressure situations.


What We Offer


	Comprehensive health maintenance organization (HMO) coverage provided by WTS Energy to support employee well-being
	Employer and employee pension contributions ensuring long-term financial security
	Accommodation and feeding provided during on-site assignments at Bonny NLNG Train 7 project
	Logistics support arranged from designated pickup points to project site to facilitate smooth commuting
	Opportunity to work on a high-profile industrial project within the Oil &amp; Gas / LNG sector, enhancing professional experience
	Exposure to multidisciplinary coordination and leadership roles fostering career growth and technical development
	Dynamic work environment with structured rotation cycles promoting work-life balance during off periods
	Engagement with international codes and standards, advancing technical expertise and industry best practices.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-22",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-23",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "WTS Energy"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

      "addressLocality": "Abuja, Enugu, Lagos, Rivers (PH)",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }

  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

Senior Building Engineer Job at WTS Energy




        
    

        
        WTS Energy provides recruitment and manpower services for the global oil and gas and energy industries. We supply engineers and consultants to our clients' projects and operations, and perform employment outsourcing services such as workforce management in oil and gas regions around the world. WTS Energy operates globally with offices in 14 countries and is operational in over 50 countries.

We are recruiting qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Building Engineer

Job Location:  Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Oil & Gas

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	WTS Energy is seeking a Senior Building Engineer to join their team supporting a major LNG train project in Nigeria.
	This role is within the oil and gas sector, focusing on industrial building design and construction support for large-scale energy infrastructure.
	The Senior Building Engineer will independently manage building design validation, material and vendor engineering, field design changes, and multi-disciplinary coordination to ensure design consistency and constructability.
	The position requires leading technical discussions with clients, resolving site issues promptly, and integrating drawings with 3D models to prevent construction conflicts.
	Candidates can expect a dynamic work environment with opportunities to influence critical project milestones and collaborate across diverse engineering disciplines.


Responsibilities


	Lead the design, review, and validation of building structural systems, layouts, and associated disciplines including waterproofing, roofing, finishing works, and building services integration such as electrical, instrumentation, plumbing, and HVAC.
	Independently manage the full project cycle from design through construction support to close-out, ensuring compliance with international codes and project specifications.
	Conduct thorough review and approval of Material Approval Requests (MAR), evaluating vendor technical documents and datasheets for compliance and initiating corrective actions when necessary.
	Oversee and manage Field Design Changes (FDC), providing engineering judgment on constructability, proposing alternative design solutions, and ensuring changes are technically sound, cost-effective, and aligned with project standards.
	Act as the primary technical coordinator for building-related multi-disciplinary interfaces, resolving design conflicts and ensuring consistency across electrical, instrumentation, HVAC, piping, and civil works disciplines.
	Lead technical discussions and negotiations with the Client, effectively defending design decisions, addressing comments, and proposing practical alternatives to achieve design closure.
	Review and ensure consistency between Approved for Construction (AFC) drawings, 3D models, and site conditions to identify and resolve mismatches prior to construction.
	Provide prompt and reliable construction support by addressing site queries, construction deviations, and delivering sound engineering decisions under pressure.
	Demonstrate strong ownership and accountability, maintaining clear and firm communication with contractors, subcontractors, the Client, and internal teams to drive project milestones and deliverables.


Qualifications
Required Qualifications:


	Bachelor’s degree in Architectural or Building Engineering
	10–15 years of proven experience in industrial building design, preferably within Oil & Gas or LNG projects
	Demonstrated expertise across the full project cycle: Design, Construction Support, and Close-out phases
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel for data handling and engineering tracking, Microsoft Word and PowerPoint for technical reporting and presentations, and AutoCAD for drawing review and mark-up
	Experience with 3D model review software such as PDMS, E3D, or SP3D
	Strong working knowledge of international codes and standards including ASCE, ACI, BS, and Eurocode
	Fluent English communication skills with the ability to convey complex technical information clearly
	Proven ability to independently manage building design and engineering tasks, including structural system validation, waterproofing, roofing, finishing works, and integration of building services (electrical, instrumentation, plumbing, HVAC)
	Expertise in reinforced concrete and steel structural configurations, foundation systems, and multi-disciplinary interface management
	Skilled in identifying design inconsistencies, interference issues, and associated risks, with the ability to interpret and apply project specifications and international codes to practical design and site conditions
	Experience in material and vendor engineering, including review and approval of Material Approval Requests (MAR), evaluation of vendor technical documents, and ensuring compliance with project specifications
	Competence in managing field design changes, providing engineering judgment on constructability, and delivering technically sound, cost-effective design solutions
	Strong multi-disciplinary coordination skills to manage complex interface issues and ensure design consistency across electrical, instrumentation, HVAC, piping, and civil works
	Ability to lead technical discussions with clients, defend design decisions, negotiate effectively, and propose practical alternatives
	Capability to review and ensure consistency between Approved for Construction (AFC) drawings, 3D models, and site conditions
	Experience providing construction support and resolving site queries and deviations under pressure.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience working on brownfield projects with site constraints
	Deep understanding of constructability principles and temporary versus permanent solution strategies
	Familiarity with code-based design justification and deviation handling processes (Technical Queries, Deviations, Letters)
	Knowledge of lifting, installation constraints, and equipment interface considerations
	Demonstrated ability to work independently with minimal supervision, exhibiting strong ownership and accountability
	Effective communication skills for engaging with contractors, subcontractors, clients, and internal teams under high-pressure situations.


What We Offer


	Comprehensive health maintenance organization (HMO) coverage provided by WTS Energy to support employee well-being
	Employer and employee pension contributions ensuring long-term financial security
	Accommodation and feeding provided during on-site assignments at Bonny NLNG Train 7 project
	Logistics support arranged from designated pickup points to project site to facilitate smooth commuting
	Opportunity to work on a high-profile industrial project within the Oil & Gas / LNG sector, enhancing professional experience
	Exposure to multidisciplinary coordination and leadership roles fostering career growth and technical development
	Dynamic work environment with structured rotation cycles promoting work-life balance during off periods
	Engagement with international codes and standards, advancing technical expertise and industry best practices.
